meta.name: WSAS Work and Social Adjustment Scale
meta.description: The WSAS is a 5-item brief scale measuring the impact of mental health problems on functioning across five domains: work, home management, social leisure, private leisure, and relationships.
meta.author: Mundt et al. (2002)
meta.reference: Mundt JC, et al. The Work and Social Adjustment Scale: a simple measure of impairment in functioning. British Journal of Psychiatry. 2002;180:461-464.
meta.instruction: Please rate how much your current mental health problems impair each area. 0 means not at all, 8 means very severely.

questions.text: My problems impair my ability to work or study
My problems impair my home management (cleaning, shopping, cooking, looking after home/family)
My problems impair my social leisure activities (going out, visiting friends, etc.)
My problems impair my private leisure activities (reading, walking, exercising, etc.)
My problems impair my ability to form and maintain close relationships with others

ranges.label: Normal
ranges.description: Your mental health problems have minimal impact on your daily functioning. This indicates that your overall mental health is in good condition, with all areas of functioning working well.
suggestions: Continue maintaining your good functional status
Stay aware of early signs of psychological distress
Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle and mental well-being
Focus on personal growth and positive experiences
Maintain regular exercise and social activities

ranges.label: Mild Functional Impairment
ranges.description: Your mental health problems have some impact on daily functioning, but it remains manageable. Mild psychological concerns are common in life. Focusing on self-care and healthy coping strategies can help maintain well-being.
suggestions: Pay attention to the areas most affected
Try proactive coping and adjustment strategies
If symptoms persist, consider consulting a professional
Focus on self-care with good routines and regular exercise
Learn simple relaxation and stress-relief techniques

ranges.label: Moderate Functional Impairment
ranges.description: Your mental health problems are noticeably affecting your daily functioning. Seeking help is recommended. At this level, psychological concerns may be affecting your daily life. It is recommended to take active steps and consider available support options.
suggestions: Consider consulting a mental health professional
Prioritize the most severely affected areas
Build a social support network
Identify your specific sources of concern
Maintain a structured daily routine

ranges.label: Severe Functional Impairment
ranges.description: Your mental health problems are severely affecting your daily functioning. Professional help is strongly recommended. Your mental health concerns are notable and may be impacting daily functioning. Speaking with a mental health professional is recommended.
suggestions: Strongly recommended to seek professional help immediately
A comprehensive treatment plan may be needed
Ensure you have a safe and supportive environment
Schedule a mental health professional assessment as soon as possible
Make sure you have trusted people around you for support
